pi_items.source: Counted all values in task dataset and verified against official presidential records from netstate.com and Wikipedia. The dataset contains exactly 46 values, one for each of the 46 U.S. Presidents from George Washington (1st) through Joe Biden (46th).

Calculated median of all 46 values using Python statistics.median(). Verified by manual calculation of sorted dataset: {42, 43, 46, 46, 47, 47, 48, 49, 49, 50, 51, 51, 51, 51, 51, 52, 52, 54, 54, 54, 54, 54, 55, 55, 55, 55, 56, 56, 56, 57, 57, 57, 57, 58, 60, 61, 61, 61, 62, 64, 64, 65, 68, 69, 70, 78}. The median of 46 values is the average of the 23rd and 24th values when sorted, which are both 55.

Verified through Python min() function and cross-referenced with historical records. Theodore Roosevelt was 42 years old when inaugurated in 1901, making him the youngest person to become U.S. President (he succeeded to the office following the assassination of William McKinley). Sources: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_presidents_of_the_United_States_by_age

Verified through Python max() function and cross-referenced with historical records. Joe Biden was 78 years and 61 days old when inaugurated on January 20, 2021, making him the oldest president inaugurated in the history of the United States at the time this dataset was created. Sources: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Inauguration_of_Joe_Biden, https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_presidents_of_the_United_States_by_age

Filename convention specified in task.json and referenced in setup_task.sh (line 28) and export_result.sh (line 43). The expected file path is /home/ga/Documents/GeoGebra/projects/presidential_ages_stats.ggb.

Defined in task.json metadata. This parameter is referenced in verifier.py as a tolerance threshold. The exact semantic meaning is unclear from code analysis, but it may relate to acceptable margin of error in data entry (e.g., allowing ±5 items in list count when checking 'has_valid_list' condition of >= 40 items).

data_provenance.source: Real historical data - Official U.S. Presidential inauguration ages
data_provenance.data_verification: The task dataset was compared against official records from netstate.com and Wikipedia and found to match exactly. All 46 values are correct and in chronological order by presidential number.

privileged_info_summary: The task dataset contains real, verified U.S. Presidential inauguration ages for all 46 presidents from Washington (1789) through Biden (2021). The dataset has exactly 46 values with minimum age 42 (Theodore Roosevelt), maximum age 78 (Joe Biden), and median age 55. These statistical properties are verified accurate against official historical records from netstate.com and Wikipedia. The data is NOT synthetic - it represents actual historical facts about U.S. Presidents.
